title: dasiphora glabra
intro: Dasiphora glabra, also known as the shrubby cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant native to Asia and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dasiphora glabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Dasiphora glabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
